manifest.name: Feature Grid
manifest.description: Three-column feature showcase with icons and descriptions
manifest.solves: Showcasing multiple features with equal visual weight

do: Use consistent icon style across items
never: Mix different levels of detail across items
Use more than 9 items in a single grid

blocks.content: Lightning Fast - Built for performance from the ground up
Type Safe - Full TypeScript coverage with strict mode
Accessible - WCAG 2.1 AA compliant out of the box
